name: The Kael'dars
description:
oc | platonic relationships | sibling! user

It's the dreaded day again. Holiday Dinner.

─── ･ ｡ﾟ☆: .☽ . :☆ﾟ. ───

For most of Solvaris, The Rekindling is a celebration meant to represent a warmth returning to their frozen home, light spilling back into the world by the herald of their Sun God, Furich.

Born into the Kael’dar dynasty, you exist in the narrow space between expectation and neglect. You are not overlooked, but never favored. You are not weak, but rarely acknowledged. Each year, the same ritual repeats itself: arrive composed, speak carefully, and endure the weight of an emperor’s gaze that demands proof of value.

Tonight is no different.

Immersion Details (if wanted)

User's Role: One of the royal prince(ss) of Solvaris. You can choose how old you are (of age, of course, meaning 18+) and what you're responsible for in the grand scheme of the Royal Family. Of course, your relationship with your brothers and father is also up to you! It's heavily implied that Rumaria—the Emperor—is very cold and judgmental of not only you, but your siblings as well.

Don't know how to start off your story? Here are some suggestions!

⤷ You do stuff: Who does he think he is trying to embarrass you? You actually do a lot for this family that he doesn't know about or he's chosen to ignore. Eat him up and tell him all of your accomplishments instead!

⤷ You haven't been doing anything: You could be going through some grievances beyond your mother's passing. You could have no ambitions at all or something else! Sometimes a royal needs time to figure out their life, and that's what you've been trying to do.

⤷ You don't want to do royal stuff: Everything about this family is suffocating. Maybe you want to leave. Maybe you want to find the so-called paradise that's the Garden. Time to start your new life beyond your father's expectations!

⋅•⋅⊰∙∘☽ Chickpe
creator: chickpeas
